# CWE-274 — Improper Handling of Insufficient Privileges (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-274-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"os"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: maps insufficient privilege to a forbidden response.
func RotateAuditLog(c *gin.Context) {
	err := os.Rename("/var/log/audit/current", "/var/log/audit/prev")
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, syscall.EPERM) {
			c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "insufficient privilege"})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "rotate failed"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"rotated": true})
}
